final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing educational infographic explaining technical concepts and their relationships.

Style/medium: needs a hand-drawn sketch aesthetic — exact line weight and texture treatment is yours
Composition: must be an infographic layout showing concept definitions and relationships between them
Subject: must include all 7 concepts with their definitions and interconnections:
  - AI
  - MCP
  - AI Agent
  - OpenClaw
  - AI Skill
  - 蒸馏 (distillation)
  - CLI
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a clear, accessible direction for educational content — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a hand-drawn paper texture feel — exact grain and surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all concept names: "AI", "MCP", "AI Agent", "OpenClaw", "AI Skill", "蒸馏", "CLI"
Constraints: must preserve all 7 concepts and their relationships, must be easy to understand with visual illustrations
Avoid: must avoid overly technical or dense academic presentation
